# Custom Components

Custom React components available for use in lesson files.

| Component | File | Used in |
|-----------|------|---------|
| [`NextSteps`](NextSteps.md) | `src/components/NextSteps` | Grammar and conjugation lessons |
| [`LessonList`](LessonList.md) | `src/components/LessonList` | Section index files |
| [`ReferenceCard`](ReferenceCard.md) | `src/components/ReferenceCard` | Reference section pages |
